fields.name: @timestamp
fields.description: Time the event occurred, in ISO 8601 format

fields.name: event.category
fields.description: High level event category such as network or process

fields.name: event.type
fields.description: Specific event type such as connection, alert, flow, or process creation

fields.name: src.ip
fields.description: Source IP address of the network connection, the client or originator address

fields.name: src.port
fields.description: Source port number of the network connection, the client or originator port

fields.name: dst.ip
fields.description: Destination IP address of the network connection, the server or responder address

fields.name: dst.port
fields.description: Destination port number of the network connection, the server or responder port

fields.name: network.transport
fields.description: Transport layer protocol such as tcp or udp

fields.name: network.protocol
fields.description: Application layer protocol such as http, dns, or tls

fields.name: host.name
fields.description: Hostname of the machine where the event was observed or generated

fields.name: user.name
fields.description: Username or account name associated with the event

fields.name: process.executable
fields.description: Full file path of the process executable image on disk

fields.name: process.command_line
fields.description: Full command line used to launch the process including arguments

fields.name: process.pid
fields.description: Process identifier number of the process

fields.name: event.severity
fields.description: Numeric severity or priority level of the alert or event

fields.name: rule.name
fields.description: Name or signature of the detection rule that produced the alert
